title: crotalaria hebecarpa
intro: Crotalaria hebecarpa, also known as Rattlebox or Butterfly Pea, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa and Asia, belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria hebecarpa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. The herbal preparations of the plant often involve making tea, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various ailments.
